'''âb-z-m''' ('''kabazam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cum|cum]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cum|cum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-z-m
|-
! Lemma
| kabazam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibazam|thibazam]] || [[word:jibazam|jibazam]] || [[word:shibazam|shibazam]] || [[word:kibazam|kibazam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubazam|thuthubazam]] || [[word:jujubazam|jujubazam]] || [[word:shushubazam|shushubazam]] || [[word:kukubazam|kukubazam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubazam|thubazam]] || [[word:jubazam|jubazam]] || [[word:shubazam|shubazam]] || [[word:kubazam|kubazam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubazam|thubazam]] || [[word:jubazam|jubazam]] || [[word:shubazam|shubazam]] || [[word:kubazam|kubazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebazam|thebazam]] || [[word:jebazam|jebazam]] || [[word:shebazam|shebazam]] || [[word:kebazam|kebazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobazam|thothobazam]] || [[word:jojobazam|jojobazam]] || [[word:shoshobazam|shoshobazam]] || [[word:kokobazam|kokobazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazam|thobazam]] || [[word:jobazam|jobazam]] || [[word:shobazam|shobazam]] || [[word:kobazam|kobazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazam|thobazam]] || [[word:jobazam|jobazam]] || [[word:shobazam|shobazam]] || [[word:kobazam|kobazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbazam|thĂŠbazam]] || [[word:jĂŠbazam|jĂŠbazam]] || [[word:shĂŠbazam|shĂŠbazam]] || [[word:kĂŠbazam|kĂŠbazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabazam|thathabazam]] || [[word:jajabazam|jajabazam]] || [[word:shashabazam|shashabazam]] || [[word:kakabazam|kakabazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabazam|thabazam]] || [[word:jabazam|jabazam]] || [[word:shabazam|shabazam]] || [[word:kabazam|kabazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabazam|thabazam]] || [[word:jabazam|jabazam]] || [[word:shabazam|shabazam]] || [[word:kabazam|kabazam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabazam|shabazam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabazam|goshabazam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabazam|gokishabazam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabazamnĂŒ|shabazamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabazamnknĂŒ|goshabazamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazamnĂŒ|gokishabazamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabazamshĂ«|shabazamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabazamnkshĂ«|goshabazamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabazamshĂ«|gokishabazamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazamro|shabazamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazamnkro|goshabazamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazamro|gokishabazamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazamu|shabazamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazamnkmu|goshabazamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazamu|gokishabazamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabazamsher|shabazamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabazamnksher|goshabazamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabazamsher|gokishabazamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabazamng|shabazamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabazamnkng|goshabazamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabazamng|gokishabazamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabazamya|shabazamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabazamnkya|goshabazamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabazamya|gokishabazamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabazamyam|shabazamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabazamnkyam|goshabazamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabazamyam|gokishabazamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazamnĂŒshĂ«|shabazamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabazamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabazamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazamnĂŒro|shabazamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazamnknĂŒro|goshabazamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazamnĂŒro|gokishabazamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazamnĂŒmu|shabazamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazamnknĂŒmu|goshabazamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazamnĂŒmu|gokishabazamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazamshĂ«nĂŒ|shabazamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabazamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabazamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazamshĂ«ro|shabazamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazamnkshĂ«ro|goshabazamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazamshĂ«ro|gokishabazamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazamshĂ«mu|shabazamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazamnkshĂ«mu|goshabazamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazamshĂ«mu|gokishabazamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazamronĂŒ|shabazamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazamnkronĂŒ|goshabazamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazamronĂŒ|gokishabazamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazamroshĂ«|shabazamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazamnkroshĂ«|goshabazamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazamroshĂ«|gokishabazamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazamromu|shabazamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazamnkromu|goshabazamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazamromu|gokishabazamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazamunĂŒ|shabazamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazamnkmunĂŒ|goshabazamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazamunĂŒ|gokishabazamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazamushĂ«|shabazamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazamnkmushĂ«|goshabazamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazamushĂ«|gokishabazamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazamuro|shabazamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazamnkmuro|goshabazamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazamuro|gokishabazamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
